# CompText Context Lab

> Reviewer console for deterministic Context Packs, replay sidecars, policy gates, and proposal-gated AI workflows. Models are providers, context is the product, evidence is the interface.

CompText Context Lab is a browser-based companion to the comptext-cli toolchain. It builds hashed, sorted Context Packs from public GitHub repositories, isolates replay-critical state into sidecars, runs explicit policy gates (allow/deny globs, secret scan, size caps), and preserves model output as reviewable proposal artifacts that are never auto-applied.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What the Context Lab is and the eight-stage pipeline.
- [About](/about): Why CompText exists and how the web app differs from the CLI.

## Optional

- [comptext-cli on GitHub](https://github.com/ProfRandom92/comptext-cli): The local-first Rust CLI that this app mirrors.
